svg.title: Section contrast audit — RR Real Estate
svg.desc: Visual rhythm analysis of background alternation between page sections, with problem areas and recommendations highlighted.
svg.text: 3 weak transitions (adjacent light sections bleed together) · 1 critical bug (duplicate dark CTA) · 1 heavy bottom (consecutive darks)
Min fix: remove duplicate CTA. High-impact fix: change testimonials background to #F9DDD0 (brand-muted).
Optional: add 1px border-top var(--color-border) to Property grid and Stats bar to register the soft↔white transitions.
